mod note: retimed to 1:30:26

This was my first speedrun of well really any game, I was not satisfied with the run (mostly cus I suck at the game) in the future I will shoot for a much lower time. 

NOTE: I accidentally paused the timer for about 5 seconds right before acid lake skip so I added a couple of seconds to the time. If you ever need my save file for whatever reason I do have it.

This was my first Main Route Speedrun, a lot of mistakes can be seen, missing the early DJs three times, the wrong warps for M3S, several deaths on Berdly 2, extra encounters, missed Spamton skip three times, died to Queen 1 three times, and Giga Queen two times. But over all a lot of room for improvement.
